item.title: Affluent Areas Dominate Weight-Loss Drug Access
item.description: Most private GLP-1 prescriptions in England go to middle-aged women in affluent areas, widening gaps as NHS access remains tightly restricted. Medscap...

item.title: US Anxiety, Depression Rates Increasing for Certain Groups
item.description: The prevalence of anxiety or depression increased significantly in the US from 2019 to 2023, varying by disability status, place of birth, race, and s...

item.description: Awake tracheal intubation using videolaryngoscopy is safe and effective in patients with suspected difficult airways, with a high success rate and a l...
